sharkord.author: Watch Party Team
sharkord.description: A plugin that allows users to watch YouTube videos together in sync within Sharkord voice channels

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist/sharkord-vid-with-friends --target bun --minify --format esm && cp package.json dist/sharkord-vid-with-friends/ && mkdir -p dist/sharkord-vid-with-friends/bin
